subject: tieng-anh
topic: Ôn tập cuối học kỳ 2 — Tiếng Anh 6

questions.question: What does 'recycle' mean? (Từ 'recycle' nghĩa là gì?)
What is the English word for 'ti vi'? ('ti vi' tiếng Anh là gì?)
Choose the comparative form of 'big'. (Chọn dạng so sánh hơn của 'big')
Which sport do you play with a racket? (Môn thể thao nào chơi bằng vợt?)
Complete the sentence: 'In the future, robots ___ help us.' (Trong tương lai, robot sẽ giúp ta — điền 'will')
Choose the superlative: 'Mount Everest is the ___ mountain in the world.' (cao nhất)
Complete (first conditional): 'If we recycle paper, we ___ trees.' (Nếu tái chế giấy, ta sẽ cứu cây)
Complete: 'My house is ___ than your house.' (to hơn)

statements.text: We use 'will' to talk about the future.
Football is played with a racket.

questions.question: Write the plural of 'tree' in English (Viết dạng số nhiều của 'tree'): ___
Choose the correct sentence about a future house (Chọn câu đúng về ngôi nhà tương lai)
options: There will be a robot in the house.

questions.question: What should you do to have a greener world? (Em nên làm gì cho thế giới xanh hơn?)

questions.passage: Hello! I'm Mai. I think houses will be different in the future. There will be smart robots to help us clean and cook. Houses will use solar energy from the sun. I hope my future house will be green and modern.
questions.question: Who is talking about the future house? (Ai đang nói về ngôi nhà tương lai?)

questions.passage: Hello! I'm Mai. I think houses will be different in the future. There will be smart robots to help us clean and cook. Houses will use solar energy from the sun. I hope my future house will be green and modern.
questions.question: What will help us clean and cook? (Cái gì sẽ giúp dọn dẹp và nấu ăn?)

questions.passage: Hello! I'm Mai. I think houses will be different in the future. There will be smart robots to help us clean and cook. Houses will use solar energy from the sun. I hope my future house will be green and modern.
questions.question: What energy will the houses use? (Những ngôi nhà sẽ dùng năng lượng gì?)
Your friend wastes a lot of paper. What is the best advice? (Bạn em lãng phí nhiều giấy. Lời khuyên tốt nhất là gì?)
options: You should recycle and reuse paper.
